global.description: The ad features a combination of text and abstract shapes on a blue background.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for a weekend getaway.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: HorizonHop UGC
elements.description: A bold, uppercase text label in a light color, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: A medium-sized text in a contrasting color, conveying a sense of urgency and adventure.

elements.label: Special fares today
elements.description: A smaller text below the main body text, emphasizing a promotional offer.

elements.label: Start now
elements.description: A rounded button with a clear call-to-action, inviting users to engage immediately.

elements.label: Top decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape at the top of the ad, adding visual interest without specific imagery.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: A small, abstract shape at the bottom, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Left decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape on the left side, enhancing the visual composition.

elements.label: Center decorative shape
elements.description: An oval shape in the center, providing a focal point in the design.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: A stylized logo representing the brand, prominently featured at the top.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: A larger text at the bottom, detailing the special offer to entice viewers.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Special fares today

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A small button inviting immediate action, placed at the bottom of the ad.
